title: COVO LOW-INCOME HOUSING FOR VETERANS - 211info
text: CENTRAL OREGON VETERANS OUTREACH COVO LOW-INCOME HOUSING FOR VETERANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Housing units (a mix of single family homes and multi-family housing located in Bend, Oregon) are prioritized for homeless, low-income veterans. COVO also assists homeless, low-income veterans with housing search for rentals throughout Central, Oregon. 61510 S Highway 97 Suite 100 Bend, OR 977023706 Eligibility: Homeless Veterans who income-qualify and pass property management screening for tenants Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 383-2793 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 383-2793 Main phone (541) 389-6639 FAX Main phone (541) 383-2793 Rental Inquiries (541) 702-1111 Utopia Property Management [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None for service, rent varies by unit DOCUMENTS: Proof of military service and proof of income. LANGUAGES: English,Spanish,interpretation of other languages or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Services: Housing Search Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OUTREACH CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRAL OREGON VETERANS OUTREACH
